title: Timber
description: If you break the root, the whole tree breaks!
body:
# Timber Data Pack

> Break trees with ease!

Just like timber mods, this pack makes the whole tree break if you broke the root.

**Disclaimer**: This also applies to player placed logs.
To avoid breaking your house, sneak when breaking logs to disable timber.

## How it works

### 1. Locate a tree
![Minecraft screenshot showing a spruce tree in a spruce forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nHGrx1Ur/images/a293d0abea6dacf3ac85e19a20fca6746057a138.png)

### 2. Break the bottom log of a tree
![Minecraft screenshot showing a spruce tree in a spruce forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nHGrx1Ur/images/624932bd1c6b96a32aad12ebcbf5212914d8ca1a.png)

### 3. Watch the whole tree break
![Minecraft screenshot showing a spruce tree in a spruce forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nHGrx1Ur/images/3d165cc624d2c152b53d9e0efa4d252355648321.png)
